metadata.name: RCSG-FW Cross-Framework Governance Mapping Instances
metadata.description: Cross-framework mapping instances linking 22 NCSC Cyber Governance Code actions to 9 international standards, part of the merged RCSG-FW v2.0.0 ontology
metadata.creator: Azlan EA-AAA

instances.mappingNotes: Risk appetite determination aligns to CAF asset management identification
Asset identification maps directly to CAF governance principle
Risk assessment maps directly to CAF cyber risk management
Threat landscape understanding aligns to CAF supply chain principle
Supply chain risk management aligns to CAF cyber risk management
Cyber strategy development maps to CAF governance principle
Strategy resourcing maps to CAF governance principle
Security culture promotion maps to CAF staff awareness and training
Skills development aligns to CAF governance and service protection

Communication protocols map to CAF response and recovery planning
Learning from incidents maps to CAF response and recovery
Governance structure establishment maps directly to CAF governance
Assurance on resilience maps to CAF risk management
Review and adapt approach maps to CAF risk management
Governance reporting maps to CAF assurance sub-principle
